result:
The convention is explicitly undocumented. From `knowledge/conventions/coding-style.md` (line 22-25):

> There is no documented convention for log / telemetry output (plain text vs structured JSON, field names, levels)... If a task needs either, say it is undocumented; do not invent one.

Tell the reviewer that logging/telemetry output conventions have not been established yet. If they need one defined, that would require drafting and filing an ADR.
